is_statement: European data sovereignty via T Cloud Public, Open Sovereign Cloud (OSC), Google Cloud and AWS sovereign variants — fully operated within the EU and BaFin/KRITIS compliant.
does_statement: Provides cloud infrastructure that passes BaFin and BSI audits without exception requests, keeping energy trading data and grid control systems under EU jurisdiction.
means_statement: Eliminates regulatory risk for NIS2 compliance by October 2026 deadline, avoiding potential fines of up to EUR 10M or 2% of global revenue.

evidence.statement: T-Systems Sovereign Cloud achieved BSI C5 Type 2 attestation in Q3 2024
